migrations.title: Seed .groundwork/config/config.toml
migrations.summary: Installs the user-owned config file on installs that predate it — init seeds it once, update never touched it.

migrations.title: Register the Serena code-intelligence MCP server
migrations.summary: Adds the Serena MCP server to .mcp.json and removes the retired depwire server; other servers are untouched.

migrations.title: Remove the orphaned .agents/groundwork/skills/ tree
migrations.summary: Deletes the orphaned .agents/groundwork/skills/ tree now that hidden skills live at .groundwork/skills/.

migrations.title: Remove orphaned bet test-manifest.json seal files
migrations.summary: Deletes now-inert .groundwork/bets/<slug>/test-manifest.json files now that ./dev bet sign is gone.

migrations.title: Retire the machine-readable bet artifacts for the prose model
migrations.summary: Removes obsolete decomposition.json/contracts/ from archived bets for the prose bet model; advises on in-flight bets.

migrations.title: Seed the capture reminder hook into Claude Code installs
migrations.summary: Seeds the non-blocking Claude Code capture-reminder PreToolUse hook into older installs; n/a without a .claude dir.

migrations.title: Silence Serena's dashboard popup and pre-approve the MCP server
migrations.summary: Appends --open-web-dashboard false to the shipped-shape Serena entry and approves the server in .claude/settings.json (enabledMcpjsonServers) so Claude Code stops re-asking every startup; user-customized entries and unparseable settings are untouched.

migrations.title: Seed the additive team policy file
migrations.summary: Installs .groundwork/config/policy.toml (the additive policy layer) on installs that predate it and gitignores the personal policy.user.toml; purely additive — an absent file behaves identically.

migrations.title: Remove OS junk files an older deploy path copied in
migrations.summary: Deletes .DS_Store/Thumbs.db/desktop.ini under docs/ and both skill trees — junk an older deploy could copy from an npm-linked dev checkout and record as framework-owned; the deploy path now filters it at the source.

migrations.title: Sort `_live` first in docs/bets/meta.json
migrations.summary: Inserts `_live` at the front of an existing docs/bets/meta.json's `pages` on projects with a docs-site service, so the in-flight mirror sorts first in the Bets rail; absent metas are left for sync-live-bets.js to create correctly.
